label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's recommended or actual business strategy

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction of program adoption or regulatory/market trend trajectory

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity or prediction

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity or fitness for purpose

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative cost comparison between disposal options

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistic or cost estimate

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Systematic analysis of IT asset disposal industry structure and costs

label: Statistical Analysis
definition: Quantitative data analysis of IT equipment depreciation and disposal costs

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of existing documents and records including post-publication outcomes

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment based on Aberdeen's IT lifecycle management research

label: High Confidence
definition: Strong evidentiary basis; multiple corroborating sources

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events or independent sources
